# Notification Sound Configuration
#
# The app uses a fallback beep sound generated by Web Audio API.
# To use a custom notification sound:
#
# 1. Find a short notification sound (MP3 format recommended)
# 2. Name it "notification.mp3"
# 3. Place it in the public/sounds/ directory
#
# Recommended sources:
# - https://mixkit.co/free-sound-effects/notification/
# - https://freesound.org/
#
# The sound should be:
# - Short (0.5-2 seconds)
# - Pleasant and not jarring
# - Small file size (<50KB)
# - Valid MP3 format (not empty or corrupted)
#
# If no MP3 file is provided, the app will automatically use
# a simple beep sound generated programmatically.
